texto: We live by our labors from one harvest to the next, there is no certain telling whether we shall be able to feed ourselves and our children, and if bad times are prolonged we know we must see the weak surrender their lives and this fact, too, is within our experience. In our lives there is no margin for misfortune.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Kamala Markandaya sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “We live by our labors from one harvest to the next, there is no certain telling whether we shall …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, thought-provoking, there, útil em momentos de termino e reflexao.
